content: Integrating spreading activation into the 2025 generation of ICM curiosity-driven autonomous agents can create a 'context-aware curiosity' that prioritizes exploration of state spaces semantically connected to the agent's already discovered surprising states, rather than random unguided exploration. This would let ICM agents leverage existing knowledge associations to guide curiosity toward high-learning-gain targets instead of wasting exploration on fully disconnected, low-value novelty.
